CONTENT.Career: Amundsen was born in Brønnøysund. He made his senior debut for Brønnøysund on 31 May 2014 against Drag; Brønnøysund won 9–0.On 18 February 2020, Amundsen signed his first professional contract with Bodø/Glimt. Amundsen made his senior debut for Bodø/Glimt on 1 July 2020 against Odd, with Bodø/Glimt winning 4–0.After winning the Eliteserien twice with Bodø/Glimt, Amundsen moved to Molde before the start of the 2024 season.
CONTENT.Personal life: On his father's side, he is a first cousin of cross-country skiers Hedda and Harald Østberg Amundsen.

SUMMARY: Isak Helstad Amundsen (born 14 October 1999) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a defender for Molde.
